label: Transparent rush stems motif
workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a rush stems botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact upright clump of wet-pasture rush stems (Juncus-like rush), many slender cylindrical dark green stems rising vertically with subtle water-grey highlights, small seed-tan lateral seed clusters near the upper stems, a few darker olive stem shadows, and clean natural botanical texture. It should read as rush stems from a wet pasture, not cattail, reed plume, bamboo, wheat, grass seed heads, sedge, or horsetail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full clump silhouette and stem tips without cropping. Clean studio lighting, crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Color palette: motif-derived dark rush green, olive-black stem shade, water grey highlights, seed tan clusters, wet-pasture neutral undertones only.
Constraints: no marsh landscape, no water body, no soil mound, no pot, no vase, no hand, no props, no second plant species, no text, no watermark, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Rush light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Rush" / "Rush Stems". Use the visible rush stems motif cutout as the botanical source reference. The board must be a wide 4K-class design-system reference derived from wet-pasture rush stems: dark green cylindrical stems, olive-black stem shadows, water-grey highlights, seed-tan clusters, and wet-pasture neutral surfaces.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear precise grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Rush, Rush Stems, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from upright rush stems, dark rush green, water-grey wet pasture light, seed tan seed clusters, olive-black stem shade, damp neutral pasture silt, and fine vertical stem linework. The board must read as rush stems from a wet pasture, not cattail, bamboo, wheat, sedge, generic grass, or generic enterprise UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 湿地, 観測, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, operations dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, wet pasture sensor table, inspection filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, vertical rush-stem texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium minimal operations design system, realistic product UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, quiet data-dense surfaces, dark green primary controls, water-grey focus and panels, seed-tan badges, olive stem dividers, damp neutral tables, subtle vertical rush-stem texture.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: dark rush green, olive stem shadow, water grey, seed tan, damp pasture paper, silt neutral, deep wet green ink.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Rush", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Rush dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Rush" / "Rush Stems". Use the visible rush stems motif and the visible light-mode board as references. It must feel like the same minimal wet-pasture operations system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear precise grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Rush, Rush Stems, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the rush-stem system language: dark rush green primary controls, olive-black stem shade backgrounds, water-grey focus rings and muted panels, seed-tan badges and warnings, damp pasture neutral borders, vertical rush-stem texture, compact operations dashboard density, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. It must read as rush stems from a wet pasture, not cattail, bamboo, wheat, sedge, generic grass, or generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 湿地, 観測, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, operations dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, wet pasture sensor table, inspection filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, vertical rush-stem texture swatches.
Visual details: deep wet-green and olive-black background, raised cards in charcoal green and silt-dark, pale water-grey foreground text, rush green and seed tan controls, water-grey focus rings and charts, damp neutral dividers, subtle vertical rush-stem overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: dark rush green, deep wet green ink, olive-black stem shade, water grey, seed tan, damp pasture neutral, mist grey.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Rush", no illegible microtext.
